one_time_description: Settlement of Hatchpoint land claim agreement reached June 25, 2021 for $41,760,869 (subsequent event after March 31, 2021)
economic_notes: 1228435 BC Ltd. purchased Glen Meadows Golf and Country Club on May 25, 2021 for $5,519,400. Pauquachin Legacy Trust holds investments with market value of $10,853,575 at year-end. First Nation has fisheries and economic development operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 1239774 BC Ltd. and 1228435 BC Ltd. One entity consolidated: Bokecen Xaxe (Sacred) Society and Social Housing. Significant subsequent event: Hatchpoint land claim settlement of $41,760,869 after year-end. Large deferred revenue balance of $5,164,548 primarily from CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative ($4,968,146) received during the year. ISC funding per Note 12 reconciliation totals $2,899,813. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($2,899,813) + Fisheries and Oceans Canada ($932,299) + First Nations Health Authority ($824,123) + Province of BC ($316,471) + Capacity funding ($275,000) + CMHC ($58,663) + FNESC ($96,162) = $5,402,531; expenses_housing combines Band Housing ($510,958) and Social Housing ($77,401). COVID-19 noted as significant event. Accumulated surplus budget column shows $9,878,553 vs actual $11,460,552.
